description: Todo-marker enrichment: has_todo, todo_count, todo_tags (sorted unique TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX). Grounded on forgeql-pub.frozen — Rust source markers plus C/C++ fixture todo patterns.

cases.name: todo_in_cpp_fixture
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'tests/fixtures/enrichment_patterns.cpp' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_todo='true' WHERE name MATCHES '^todo' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 10

cases.name: todo_count_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/ast/enrich/todo.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE name='marker_word_boundary' WHERE todo_count=3 LIMIT 5

cases.name: todo_tags_multi_marker
cases.fql: FIND symbols WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_todo='true' WHERE todo_tags='FIXME,HACK,TODO' ORDER BY line ASC LIMIT 10

cases.name: negative_no_todo_in_rust
cases.fql: FIND symbols IN 'crates/forgeql-core/src/node_id.rs' WHERE fql_kind='function' WHERE has_todo='true' LIMIT 5
